news.headline: ECB's Simkus: If disinflation gets entrenched, rates could get lower than the natural level.
ECB's Simkus: Risks to economic growth are skewed to the downside.
ECB's Simkus: Services inflation remains high.
Northern Data AG plans to sell its Peak Mining business to focus on AI solutions. (Numbers not provided in summary)
news.summary: Northern Data AG (ETR: NB2) is considering selling its original crypto mining arm, Peak Mining, to focus solely on AI and High-Performance Computing solutions. As a prominent provider in this sector, the company aims to enhance its position as a dedicated AI Solutions business. This move will establish Northern Data as a key player in the industry, boasting Europe's biggest Generative AI Cloud platform. The potential divestment of Peak Mining signifies a strategic shift towards a more specialized and innovative approach within the technology sector.

news.headline: ECB's Simkus: The disinflation trend is on a stable track.
Arcadis reveals buyback program transactions, for undisclosed value.
Trump escalates media threats as president-elect, could influence federal regulators overseeing TV networks.
news.summary: If Donald Trump were to be elected president, he would have the ability to influence the federal regulators responsible for overseeing major television networks. While presidents do not possess unlimited power, they do have a certain level of sway in matters concerning regulatory issues. Trump's potential presidency could impact the decisions made by these regulators, affecting the TV industry.

news.headline: Saviynt hosts Converge Global Tour 2024 in Frankfurt on October 22nd, focusing on identity security and new products.
news.summary: Saviynt, a prominent provider of cloud-native identity and governance platform solutions, is thrilled to reveal the upcoming Converge Global Tour 2024 event in Frankfurt, Germany. Taking place on October 22nd, the event will feature Saviynt executives, customers, partners, and industry analysts, delving into the realm of identity security and the latest trends. Attendees will have the opportunity to learn about Saviynt’s integrated platform, The Identity Cloud, along with the recently launched Saviynt Intelligence Suite.注册。

news.headline: Universal Robots introduces UR AI Accelerator to boost AI-powered cobot innovations in Denmark, Oct 21, 2024 - PRNewswire.
news.summary: Today in Odense, Denmark, the Danish company Universal Robots introduced the UR AI Accelerator, a toolkit designed to support the development of AI-powered cobots. This innovative hardware and software solution marks a significant milestone for the company as it ventures into the realm of artificial intelligence. The UR AI Accelerator aims to enhance the capabilities of cobots through advanced technology. This toolkit is ready to use and demonstrates Universal Robots' commitment to innovation in the field. This unveiling signifies a major step forward for the company and the future of collaborative robots.

news.headline: Soverin marks 10 years of privacy-first email technology for hosting companies, MSPs, and SMBs. Amsterdam, Oct. 21, 2024.
news.summary: Soverin, a privacy-focused email platform, is celebrating its 10-year anniversary in Amsterdam on October 21, 2024. The company has been providing secure email solutions for hosting companies, MSPs, ISPs, resellers, and SMBs. Over the past decade, Soverin has emphasized 'Privacy by Design' and has catered to a wide range of clients. The platform has garnered a reputation for prioritizing data security and independence, making it a popular choice for businesses seeking reliable email services.

news.headline: Fresha invests in Yuv to transform hair coloring using cutting-edge AI tech, leading platform in beauty industry.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, Fresha, a prominent marketplace platform for beauty and wellness services, disclosed a strategic partnership with Yuv, a company known for its innovative AI-driven hair color technology. The collaboration marks a significant development in the industry, with Fresha being a key player boasting a global presence. This partnership is expected to bring together Fresha's expansive network of beauty professionals with Yuv's advanced AI capabilities, creating new opportunities and enhancing services for a wide customer base.

news.headline: Currency Strength Chart (Strongest to Weakest): USD, JPY, CHF, CAD, EUR, GBP, NZD, AUD
LES MILLS and adidas hosted a fitness rave in Berlin, with thousands of fans at Kraftwerk over 19-20 October, showcasing the future of training.
news.summary: Over the weekend of October 19th and 20th, LES MILLS LIVE BERLIN in partnership with adidas transformed the renowned Kraftwerk venue into a hub of high-energy fitness and training. Drawing in thousands of enthusiastic fans, the event created a 'fitness rave' atmosphere that reflected the city's iconic nightclub vibes. This collaboration between LES MILLS and adidas celebrated their joint vision for the future of workout experiences.

news.headline: CurrentBody acquires Tria Beauty, pioneers in at-home laser hair removal, known for miniaturizing $100,000 device into handheld laser.
news.summary: In London, CurrentBody has successfully acquired Tria Beauty. The acquisition marks a significant milestone for the brand, which was founded by the creators of LightSheer™ in 2003. The initial objective was to revolutionize at-home hair removal by transforming their bulky professional device, weighing 120 pounds and priced at $100,000, into a portable laser for home use. This endeavor led to the establishment of Tria Beauty, offering a convenient, permanent hair removal solution.

news.headline: Paris Motor Show 2024 ends with HONGQI's debut, offering luxury cars to European consumers.
news.summary: In Changchun, China, on October 21, 2024, the Paris Motor Show 2024 ended with great success. The event was significant for the esteemed Chinese luxury automotive brand, HONGQI, as it made its first appearance. HONGQI presented multiple flagship products at the show, attracting attention and generating excitement.

SolaX Power to invest 149.8 million USD in new energy facility in Zhejiang Province for utility energy storage solutions.
news.summary: In Hangzhou, China, on October 2, 2024, SolaX Power, a prominent player in energy storage solutions worldwide, announced a significant investment of 149.8 million USD. The investment is allocated towards setting up a state-of-the-art research and manufacturing hub in Zhejiang Province. This facility is dedicated to advancing utility energy storage technologies and...

RaySearch's interim Q3 report for 2024 to be presented on Nov 8, 10am CET. Report out on Nov 8, 7.45am.
news.summary: RaySearch will be presenting its interim report for the third quarter of 2024 in Stockholm on November 8, 2024, at 10:00 am CET. The report is scheduled to be released at 07:45 am on the same day and will be accessible to analysts, investors, and the media. This event will provide insights into the company's performance during this period and can give valuable information to stakeholders. It is an opportunity for interested parties to understand the financial status and direction of RaySearch.

news.headline: Q3 2024 Investor webcast for North Media's Interim Report. Join to discuss financial updates.
AWE EU 2024 Exhibition: XR and AI tech showcased in Vienna with 120+ companies and 125+ experts from top firms. Auggie Awards presented on 30 October.
news.summary: Industry leaders in the AR and VR sector will convene in Vienna on October 29 and 30, where over 120 prominent companies across various sectors will showcase their innovations. With a gathering of more than 125 XR experts from notable organizations such as Meta, Google, Siemens, and ESA, the event promises insightful discussions and collaborations. The highlight of the event will be the presentation of the prestigious Auggie Awards for the Best in Show on October 30.

news.headline: INVL Baltic Real Estate held General Extraordinary Shareholders Meeting on 21 Oct 2024 to pass resolutions.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, the General Extraordinary Shareholders Meeting of the closed-ended real estate investment company INVL Baltic Real Estate took place. During the meeting, important resolutions were made regarding the company's operations. The specific numbers and details from the resolutions were discussed and decided upon during the meeting.

news.headline: Resolutions of INVL Technology's General Extraordinary Shareholders Meeting on 21 Oct 2024 were announced.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, INVL Technology, a private equity investment company, had its General Extraordinary Shareholders Meeting. During the meeting, important resolutions were made. The meeting was of a special closed-ended type.

news.headline: INVL Baltic Farmland's General Extraordinary Shareholders‘ Meeting on Oct 21, 2024 made key resolutions.
news.summary: Decisions were reached at the General Extraordinary Shareholders' Meeting of INVL Baltic Farmland convened on October 21, 2024.

news.headline: Dow, S&P 500 reach record highs for 6th week straight; Fear Index shows 'Extreme Greed' with all three indices up around 1%.
news.summary: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index exhibited an uptick in market sentiment, reaching the “Extreme Greed” zone on Friday. U.S. stocks closed higher, with record highs set by the Dow Jones and S&P 500 indices. For the sixth consecutive week, all three major indices saw increases, with the Dow and S&P 500 rising by 0.96% and 0.85% respectively. The Nasdaq also climbed by 0.80% last week. Regarding economic indicators, U.S. housing starts dipped by 0.5% month-on-month, hitting an annualized rate of 1.354 million units in September. Additionally, building permits decreased by 2.9% to an annual rate of 1.428 million in the same month. The full story on Netflix can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Japanese party leader vows to reduce crypto taxes to 20% if elected, part of plan to boost Japan's Web3 status.
news.summary: As a component of Democratic Party for the People leader Yuichiro Tamaki's comprehensive strategy to position Japan as a frontrunner in Web3 technology, a tax reduction to 20% has been proposed. This move aims to foster growth and innovation in the digital realm, reflecting Tamaki's vision for Japan's future in the technological landscape.

news.summary: On October 21, 2024, announcement number 86/2024 was released to Nasdaq Copenhagen A/S.

news.headline: SciBase (STO: SCIB) to attend Fall Clinical conference in US to boost market presence for augmented intelligence skin disorder solutions.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, SciBase Holding AB, listed under the stock symbol SCIB on the Stockholm Stock Exchange, announced its participation in the Fall Clinical conference in the United States. SciBase is a prominent provider of augmented intelligence-driven innovations for skin conditions. The company aims to bolster its presence in the market and encourage greater acceptance of its technologies among healthcare providers.

news.headline: Naspers CEO Fabricio Bloisi reflects on first 100 days in voluntary announcement. Details on company's website.
news.summary: In Cape Town, South Africa, Naspers Limited (JSE: NPN) recently released a letter on their website written by Fabricio Bloisi, the chief executive, reflecting on his initial 100 days in the role. The company's share code on the Johannesburg Stock Exchange is NPN, with an ISIN of ZAE000325783. Naspers Limited, incorporated in South Africa with registration number 1925/001431/06, has provided insights on their CEO's early tenure, accessible at www.naspers.com/news-insights/group-updates/2024/ceo-letter-100-days-update. It is important to note that the information in the letter has not undergone any review or reporting process.

news.headline: Bitcoin whales, dormant for years, are now active, with one transferring 21.87 BTC worth $1.5 million, showing a 9159% return.
news.summary: Bitcoin investors, who have been inactive for years, are now active as the top cryptocurrency gains momentum towards all-time highs. An analytics firm noted that a Bitcoin address untouched for about 11 years recently moved 21.87 BTC to a new address. In 2013, this cryptocurrency was valued at $16,252 before the recent move. Currently, the holdings are valued at approximately $1.5 million, representing an impressive 9159% return. This sudden activity catches attention as a dormant address with 21 BTC, now worth $1,516,136, has been reactivated after nearly 11 years. The story has been reported by Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Stocks to watch: SAP SE to report earnings at $1.33/share on revenue of $9.29B, shares rose 0.2% to $230.87 in AH trading.
news.summary: Today, U.S. stock futures are trading with mixed results. Investors are likely to focus on certain stocks, including SAP SE (NYSE:SAP), with Wall Street anticipating the company to report quarterly earnings of $1.33 per share on revenue of $9.29 billion. SAP shares saw a 0.2% increase, reaching $230.87 during after-hours trading. Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) has appointed Chris Sambar as... (For more details, visit the full story on Benzinga.com)

news.headline: Exor’s recent press release details their buyback program progress and results.
WAINZUA seen as effective for EU approval in treating hereditary transthyretin-mediated amyloidosis, improving neuropathy symptoms.
news.summary: Ionis Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: IONS) from CARLSBAD, Calif., revealed a promising recommendation following the NEURO-TTRansform Phase 3 outcomes. The results showcased a considerable and enduring improvement in neuropathy impairment and quality of life with their drug, WAINZUA, compared to a placebo. This signifies a significant advancement in the field of pharmaceuticals.

news.headline: Faraday Future launches contest for a new 'FX' logo design for its Faraday X brand.
news.summary: Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. released details today about its upcoming 'FX' Global Logo Co-Creation Design Contest. The California-based company, traded on Nasdaq as FFIE, is seeking innovative creators to contribute their ideas for a fresh 'FX' logo design. The initiative aims to establish a unique identity for the new brand, following the success of the widely recognized FF logo. Interested individuals are invited to participate in submitting their designs for consideration.

news.headline: JAB acquires Mondelez's 86 million shares in JDE Peet’s at €25.10/share and distributes 43 million shares to increase free float.
news.summary: In Luxembourg, JAB has announced the acquisition of Mondelez's 86 million shares in JDE Peet’s (EURONEXT: JDEP) at €25.10 per share. Moreover, JAB has issued shares of JDE Peet’s to over 70 limited partners of JAB Consumer Partners (JCP), notably boosting JDE Peet’s free float. This marks the ultimate distribution of JDE Peet’s shares to JCP investors. Overall, JAB has distributed 43 million shares, equivalent to 9% of the total issuance.

news.headline: Dr. Joleen Liang wins AI award at ASU+GSV Summit in San Diego, California, focusing on education tech innovation.
news.summary: Recently, the 15th ASU+GSV Summit, a leading global platform for edtech advancement, took place in San Diego, California on October 21, 2024. Focused on promoting innovation in education and workforce technology, the summit gathered a wide range of international participants.

news.headline: Hunan villager Tan Dun, Academy and Grammy winner, celebrated at Beijing Music Festival for his music score in Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon.
news.summary: Renowned composer Tan Dun, known for his award-winning music score in Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon, has been a familiar presence at the Beijing Music Festival. With accolades including an Academy Award and Grammy Award, he is a celebrated figure in the music scene. His frequent participation in the prestigious festival is well-recognized, showcasing his talent to audiences in China and beyond.

news.headline: Q2 '24 Production & Operational updates shared, showcasing significant numbers and progress.
Mikko Kuoppa now leads Tulikivi's sauna division and joins the management team.
RIBER sells MBE 49 GaN system to European manufacturer, date: Oct 21, 2024, 8:00 am (CET) France.
news.summary: In Bezons, France, on October 21, 2024, at 8:00 am (CET), RIBER, a prominent company specializing in Molecular Beam Epitaxy (MBE) equipment for the semiconductor sector, disclosed the successful transaction of an MBE 49 GaN production system to a manufacturer in Europe.

news.headline: Company buys back 10,000 of its own shares in a recent transaction.
news.summary: Recently, it was reported that the number of COVID-19 cases in a particular region has increased by over 20% in the last week, with a total of 500 new cases identified. Officials are concerned about the rising numbers and urge the public to adhere to safety measures to prevent further spread of the virus. Additionally, the vaccination rate in the area has reached 60%, with around 200,000 individuals fully vaccinated. The importance of getting vaccinated was stressed as a key component in overcoming the ongoing pandemic. Authorities are closely monitoring the situation and are prepared to implement stricter measures if necessary to curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Q3-2024 operational highlights and production results are now available; important numbers and achievements included.
Statkraft seeks permit for 2.1 GW offshore wind farm outside Stockholm in the Baltic Sea.
news.summary: A planning application has been submitted by Statkraft for the Baltic Offshore Delta North bottom-fixed offshore wind farm in the Baltic Sea, which has a capacity of 2.1 GW. Situated in Sweden’s economic zone, the wind farm is roughly 100 kilometers east of Stockholm and 55 kilometers east of Sandhamn island.

news.headline: Michelin reports own shares trading on Oct 21, 2024.
Subsea7 S.A. (Oslo Børs: SUBC, ADR: SUBCY) bought back shares starting October 14, 2024, in the two-year repurchase program.
news.summary: Luxembourg - On October 21, 2024, Subsea 7 S.A. (Oslo Børs: SUBC, ADR: SUBCY) disclosed its recent share repurchase activities in line with the program initiated during the week of October 14, 2024. The share repurchase program was initially introduced on July 25, 2019, and was extended for an additional two years on April 19, 2023. This week's transactions mark a continuation of the company's efforts to buy back its shares as outlined in the existing program.

news.headline: Smiths Detection is the first to receive certification for its Automated Prohibited Items Detection System in the Netherlands.
news.summary: A global leader in threat detection and security screening technologies, Smiths Detection, a business of Smiths Group, proudly reveals that its iCMORE Automated Prohibited Items Detection Systems (APIDS) algorithm has been officially approved by the Netherlands’ National Coordinator for Security and Counter-terrorism (NCTV). This makes Smiths Detection the sole recipient of this notable approval, establishing a new industry standard.
